title: CX Configuration Schema (v1)
description: JSON Schema for cx.toml configuration files. This schema validates the structural shape and enum constraints. Runtime validation in src/config/load.ts enforces relational invariants (e.g., catch_all restrictions) and semantic rules.

extends.description: Optional one-level inheritance pointer to a sibling cx.toml file. Use this in agent-specific profiles such as cx-mcp.toml. The runtime loader rejects deeper chaining.

schema_version.description: Configuration schema version. Currently supports version 1 only.

project_name.description: Project identifier. Must start with alphanumeric; may contain dots, hyphens, underscores. Used in output paths and manifest naming.

source_root.description: Filesystem root for resolving relative paths and VCS discovery. Typically '.' for the repository root.

output_dir.description: Directory where bundle output files are written. May contain {project} placeholder.

xml.description: File extension for XML output style. Must start with '.' and contain no path separators.

json.description: File extension for JSON output style.

markdown.description: File extension for Markdown output style.

plain.description: File extension for Plain text output style.

style.description: Default output style for sections. Sections may override per-section.

show_line_numbers.description: Include line numbers in Repomix output.

include_empty_directories.description: Include empty directories in directory tree output.

security_check.description: Enable security scanning during Repomix rendering.

include.description: Glob patterns to add files to the VCS master list. Applied before global excludes.

exclude.description: Glob patterns to remove files from the master list. Acts as security override.

follow_symlinks.description: Whether to follow symbolic links during filesystem discovery.

unmatched.description: How to handle master-list files not claimed by any section.

mode.description: How to handle section overlaps when multiple sections claim the same file. 'fail' rejects any overlap; 'warn' logs and deduplicates; 'first-wins' deduplicates silently. Priority values determine ownership in non-fail modes.

order.description: Tiebreaker for sections with equal priority. 'config' uses declaration order in the file; 'lexical' sorts by section name.

format.description: Manifest output format. Currently supports JSON only.

pretty.description: Format JSON with indentation and newlines (readable but larger files).

include_file_sha256.description: Include SHA-256 checksums for each source file.

include_output_sha256.description: Include SHA-256 checksums for each output bundle.

include_output_spans.description: Include byte span information for output sections.

include_source_metadata.description: Include VCS metadata (commit, branch, author) in the manifest.

include_linked_notes.description: When true, pull notes linked from bundled source files into the bundle plan.

algorithm.description: Checksum algorithm. Currently supports SHA-256 only.

file_name.description: Filename for checksum file. May contain {project} placeholder.

encoding.description: Token encoding model name (e.g., 'o200k_base' for Claude 3.5 Sonnet).

include.description: Glob patterns to select asset files.

exclude.description: Glob patterns to exclude asset files.

mode.description: How to handle asset files. 'copy' copies to targetDir; 'ignore' skips; 'fail' aborts if assets are matched.

target_dir.description: Directory where assets are placed. May contain {project} placeholder.

layout.description: How to organize assets in targetDir. 'flat' places all in root; 'deep' preserves directory structure.

duplicate_entry.description: How to handle duplicate glob patterns within the same array. Applies to files.include, files.exclude, sections.*.include, sections.*.exclude, assets.include, assets.exclude.

sections.description: Section definitions. Each section is a classifier that selects files from the master list. Reserved names (manifest, assets, bundle) are not allowed.

include.description: Glob patterns that select files from the master list for this section. Required unless catch_all = true.

exclude.description: Glob patterns that remove files from this section after include matching.

style.description: Output style for this section. Overrides the default repomix.style.

priority.description: Numeric priority for overlap resolution. Higher values win when multiple sections claim the same file.

catch_all.description: If true, this section absorbs all master-list files not claimed by other sections. Mutually exclusive with include. At most one catch_all section per project.

not.errorMessage: catch_all sections must not specify include patterns

errorMessage.not: sections must not use reserved names: 'manifest', 'assets', or 'bundle'
